title: post api member login with valid credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/member/login with valid account and encrypted password returns HTTP 200 with a response containing code, token, memberId, and userId, enabling subsequent CRM API calls.

title: post api crm lead saveorupdate with valid auth and payload
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/lead/saveOrUpdate with valid authentication headers and valid lead data creates or updates a sales lead successfully, returning HTTP 200 with code 1000 and lead data.

title: post api crm lead page with valid auth and filters
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/lead/page with valid authentication headers and filters like phone or name returns HTTP 200 with code and matching lead records in the data array.

title: post api crm lead claimlead with valid auth and leadids
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/lead/claimLead with valid authentication headers and leadIds claims the leads successfully, returning HTTP 200 with code 1000.

title: post api crm lead assign with valid auth and assignment data
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/lead/assign with valid authentication headers, leadIds, newFollowUserId, and newFollowUserName assigns leads correctly, returning HTTP 200 with code 1000.

title: post api crm lead movepublicsea with valid auth and reason
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/lead/movePublicSea with valid authentication headers, leadIds, publicSeaReasonCode, and remark moves leads to public sea successfully, returning HTTP 200 with code 1000.

title: post api crm common activity saveorupdate with valid auth and relationid
description: Verify that POST /api/crm/common/activity/saveOrUpdate with valid authentication headers and valid relationId creates or updates an activity record linked to a lead, returning HTTP 200 with code 1000.

title: get api crm common country list with valid auth
description: Verify that GET /api/crm/common/country/list with valid authentication headers returns HTTP 200 with code and a data array of countries for lead countryCode resolution.

title: get api member user effective list with valid auth
description: Verify that GET /api/member/user/effective/list with valid authentication headers returns HTTP 200 with a data array of effective users for lead assignment selection.
